went_well: 34 media-manifest records were appended and their expected paths, byte counts, and SHA-256 values were audited against disk.
The TWA manifest's canonical start URL, icon, maskable icon, and web-manifest URLs were audited alongside the release metadata.
went_wrong: JSON parsing and local metadata auditing do not prove a remote GitHub Pages deployment or asset delivery.

metrics.name: media_manifest_records_appended
metrics.method: Supplemental local audit: unique expected path set and every record byte count/SHA-256 matched disk.

metrics.name: json_parser_checks
metrics.method: python3 -m json.tool assets/media-manifest.json >/dev/null; python3 -m json.tool apk/twa-manifest.json >/dev/null — both exit 0 with no output.

improvement_actions.action: Require the next player-facing asset batch to include a source-approved production sheet with generator/method, provenance status, output paths, byte counts, and checksums before its manifest entries are accepted.
